home_subtitle: Downloaders, search, shortlinks, and an Ai assistant — organized into one calm workspace.
card_youtube_desc: Download video, audio, or search content straight from YouTube.
card_ai_desc: Chat with an Ai assistant, send images or any file.
card_shortlink_desc: Turn long links into short ones in one click.
card_spotify_desc: Search and download tracks complete with metadata and cover art.
card_image_desc: Remove backgrounds, upscale resolution, and restore blurry faces.
card_docs_desc: Learn how to use every endpoint as a REST API.
yt_subtitle: Paste a YouTube link, or type a keyword to search.
metadata_desc: Every downloaded file automatically includes thumbnail, artist name, and title — so it's never blank when played.
drop_hint: Drag & drop a file or folder here (desktop only)
shortlink_subtitle: Paste a long link, pick a provider, then shorten it.
docs_subtitle: Every feature in Web Helper can also be used directly as a REST API — no need to open this page.
docs_step1: Pick a feature in the sidebar and fill the form as usual on the web UI.
docs_step2: Copy the matching endpoint URL pattern from the Raw JSON panel.
docs_step3: Call that endpoint from any app, bot, or script — every HTTP method is accepted.
docs_step4: Read the JSON response: the result field holds the data, while ping and time show request performance.
